videos.headline: Aidan Chiles dashes in for early Michigan State TD
videos.description: Aidan Chiles scores the first touchdown of the game, giving Michigan State an early lead over Prairie View A&M.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Aidan Chiles dashes in for early Michigan State TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Aziah Johnson breaks free from two tackles for a Michigan State TD
videos.description: Aziah Johnson fights off two defenders to reach the end zone for a Michigan State touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Aziah Johnson breaks free from two tackles for a Michigan State TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nathan Carter turns on the jets for 60 yard Michigan State TD
videos.description: Nathan Carter runs for 60-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nathan Carter runs for 60-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Charles Brantley scores 100-yard pick-six for Michigan State
videos.description: Charles Brantley intercepts the pass in the end zone and takes it all the way back for a stunning 100-yard touchdown return for Michigan State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Charles Brantley scores 100-yard pick-six for Michigan State) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
